task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the Rancher dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher web interface is visible in the browser, showing the home screen, cluster dashboard, or workload overview, indicating successful authentication.
The Rancher UI shows 'data-platform' selected in the namespace filter dropdown at the top of the screen or in the workloads list.
The Rancher UI displays the 'postgres-primary' workload in the StatefulSets list or shows its specific detail view.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the configuration or YAML of the StatefulSet to diagnose and fix failures
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI shows the 'Edit Config' form or 'Edit YAML' screen for the 'postgres-primary' StatefulSet, indicating the agent is actively modifying the broken configuration.

task_completion.description: The 'postgres-primary' StatefulSet and its pods are restored to a healthy, Running status
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI shows the 'postgres-primary' StatefulSet with a green 'Active' or 'Running' status indicator, and the associated pod count shows the expected number of pods in a 'Running' state.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Rancher web application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real web browser navigating the Rancher UI, not a mock-up, text editor, or static HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the StatefulSet status
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manually alter the DOM to show 'Active' or 'Running' text.

integrity.description: Agent utilized the requested Rancher interface rather than exclusively using terminal commands to bypass the UI requirement
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Rancher UI being used for at least the verification of the StatefulSet status, rather than only showing a terminal window with kubectl commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Namespace: 'data-platform'. Target StatefulSet: 'postgres-primary'. The task requires fixing the StatefulSet so that its pods reach a 'Running' status. A passing score requires remediating at least 3 out of 4 injected failures, which will visually result in the StatefulSet showing as healthy/active in the Rancher UI.
